transcript:
Agent: Hi, I'm calling about my Ooma Office bill.
Rep: Let me transfer you to another department.
Agent: I was already transferred twice.
Rep: I don't see that account in the system.
Agent: Can I speak to a manager?
Rep: You'll have to call back tomorrow.

key_quotes.text: Let me transfer you to another department
I don't see that account in the system
You'll have to call back tomorrow
